# PLEASE NOTE CUDA-Q REQUIRES LINUX OR WSL2

We recommend the usage of a LINUX environment for both QISKIT and CUDA-Q simulations.

The CUDA-Q implementations also require an NVIDIA graphics card for GPU acceleration.

Google Colab notebooks can be created to test CUDA-Q scripts if a linux system is unavaliable.
Steps:
    - Switch execution type to GPU
    - %pip install cudaq
    - %pip install cuquantum
    - %pip install ... (script related dependancies)
